news_items.headline: Yankees' Cam Schlittler, amid threats, excited to face Red Sox
news_items.description: Yankees pitcher Cam Schlittler said he and his family have received threats ahead of his start vs. the Red Sox, but he's "excited" to be making his Fenway Park debut.
